$comment: Versioned, immutable release URL (git tag v2.9.0); 'main' carries the latest. See GOVERNANCE.md.
title: Genlock Extension Data
description: Supplementary schema for data stored under extensions.x-genlock. `x-spore` is the pre-rename alias of this namespace and is still accepted by readers (sunset: SKEL 3.0, see MIGRATIONS.md). The core SKEL schema remains vendor-neutral and does not require this schema. Host-mapping details live in GENLOCK_HOST_PROFILE.md.

startFrameImage.description: Genlock's storage field for the neutral BONE output target 'start_frame'.

endFrameImage.description: Genlock's storage field for the neutral BONE output target 'end_frame'.

image.description: Genlock's storage field for the neutral BONE output target 'still'.

startFramePrompt.description: Prompt text that produced startFrameImage (legacy provenance; new writers SHOULD also populate provenance.start_frame).

endFramePrompt.description: Prompt text that produced endFrameImage (legacy provenance; new writers SHOULD also populate provenance.end_frame).

production_status.description: DEPRECATED mirror of the core shot.status field. Since SKEL 2.9 the core field is canonical: pipelines write shot.status; hosts MAY maintain this mirror for pre-2.9 readers and MUST treat the core field as the source of truth on conflict. Removal target: SKEL 3.0 (see MIGRATIONS.md).

provenance.description: Generation provenance for image renders stored in this namespace, keyed by which image field the render landed in.

proposals.description: AI-authored or user-authored proposed changes for the entity that owns this extension object.

ProposalPatch.description: Optional machine-readable change payload. Shape is intentionally open because proposal payloads vary by type.

id.description: Stable proposal ID. Must remain unchanged when status changes.

by.description: Author or agent identifier, e.g. codex, claude, user, or a user handle.

summary.description: Short human-readable description of the proposed change.

target.description: Optional explicit target when the proposal is stored above or outside the entity it affects.

Provenance.description: How this render was made: enough to reproduce it, audit it, and disclose it. Hosts SHOULD write this block for every AI-generated image.

prompt.description: The final assembled prompt sent to the generator.

job_id.description: Provider job/request ID for audit trails.
